text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: kbowling
Date: Sun Nov 10 23:18:25 UTC 2019
New revision: 517238
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/517238

Log:
  news/inn: Update to 2.6.3 and fix rnews

  Update to 2.6.3 and fix a sandbox violation with the default build options when building under i.e. poudriere by moving rnews permissions to the plist.

  Changelog https://www.eyrie.org/~eagle/software/inn/docs-2.6/news.html#S2

  PR:		224670
  Approved by:	krion (mentor)
  Sponsored by:	BBOX.io
  Differential Revision:	https://reviews.freebsd.org/D22254

Changes:
  head/news/inn/Makefile
  head/news/inn/distinfo
  head/news/inn/pkg-plist
